name: TheNewsAPI
description: Global news aggregation REST API providing real-time and historical news articles from thousands of sources with filtering by category, language, country, and search. Indexes over 1 million new articles per week from 40,000+ sources across 50+ countries and 35+ languages.

offers.description: Free and paid subscription plans available. Free plan includes access to top stories and all news endpoints.

potentialAction.name: Search All News
potentialAction.description: Search and filter the entire article database with comprehensive options.

potentialAction.name: Get Top Stories
potentialAction.description: Retrieve live and historical top stories with advanced filtering.

potentialAction.name: Get Headlines
potentialAction.description: Get the latest headlines organized by category.

potentialAction.name: Get Article by UUID
potentialAction.description: Retrieve a specific news article by its unique UUID.

potentialAction.name: Get Similar News
potentialAction.description: Find articles similar to a specific article.

potentialAction.name: List Sources
potentialAction.description: List all available news sources with metadata.

about.name: News Aggregation
about.description: Aggregates news articles from 40,000+ global sources.

about.name: Real-Time News
about.description: Provides real-time access to breaking news and top stories.

about.name: Historical News Archive
about.description: Full historical archive searchable across all indexed sources.

areaServed.name: Worldwide
areaServed.description: 50+ countries including US, CA, GB, AU, DE, FR, JP, IN, BR, and more.
